# VisionOps

> VisionOps is a Kubernetes and DevOps consulting company based in the Czech Republic. We specialize in production Kubernetes cluster implementation, OpenShift administration, cloud migration, CI/CD automation, and infrastructure monitoring. We serve businesses looking for container orchestration expertise, both on-premises and in the cloud.

- Website: [https://visionops.cz](https://visionops.cz)
- Full content: [https://visionops.cz/llms-full.txt](https://visionops.cz/llms-full.txt)
- Contact: info@visionops.cz
- Languages: Czech, English

## Services

- [Kubernetes Implementation & Management](https://visionops.cz/#services): Production clusters with high availability, autoscaling, and multi-region. On-prem and cloud (AKS, OpenShift). Includes consulting, deployment, security hardening, and networking.
- [Cloud & Container Migration](https://visionops.cz/#services): Safe application migration with minimal downtime. VMware to Proxmox, VMware to bare-metal Kubernetes, on-prem to cloud and back.
- [CI/CD Automation & GitOps](https://visionops.cz/#services): Fully automated pipelines from commit to production. ArgoCD, Tekton, Jenkins, GitOps workflows, canary deployments, automated rollbacks.
- [Infrastructure Monitoring & Observability](https://visionops.cz/#services): Complete infrastructure visibility — metrics, logs, traces. Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, OpenTelemetry, Zabbix, Jaeger.

## Technology Stack

- Platforms: Kubernetes, OpenShift, AKS
- CI/CD: ArgoCD, Jenkins, Tekton, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions
- Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, OpenTelemetry, Zabbix, Jaeger
- IaC & Security: Terraform, Ansible, Helm, Vault, Trivy

## Engagement Process

1. Assessment — thorough analysis of current infrastructure state
2. Solution design — custom architecture tailored to your needs
3. Implementation — Infrastructure as Code, automation, best practices
4. Knowledge transfer — training, documentation, complete handoff
5. Ongoing support — consulting available after go-live

## Optional

- [About VisionOps](https://visionops.cz/#why): Why choose VisionOps — Kubernetes expertise, proven solutions, knowledge transfer, flexibility across on-prem/cloud/hybrid
